assertions.reason: The real typecheck CLI surface rejects the regression case where an in-scope generic parameter is passed to a concrete `i32` parameter, so generic parameters no longer behave as unconstrained wildcards at that call site.
evidence: Fixture: `test/test_typecheck.ml` defines `invalid_generic_param_to_concrete` and registers it as negative test 28 expecting `type mismatch`.

Command: `cd /home/lenstr/workspace/personal/hack/rgo-lang && export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=/home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/misc-followups-4/cli-generic-soundness/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29` -> exit 0 with `[OK] negative 28 generic param to concrete rejected`.

assertions.reason: The real typecheck CLI surface rejects returning `B` from a function declared to return `A`, confirming distinct in-scope caller type parameters are now rigid rather than mutually compatible wildcards.
evidence: Fixture: `test/test_typecheck.ml` defines `invalid_generic_param_cross_return` and registers it as negative test 29 expecting `type mismatch`.

Command: `cd /home/lenstr/workspace/personal/hack/rgo-lang && export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=/home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/misc-followups-4/cli-generic-soundness/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test negative 28,29` -> exit 0 with `[OK] negative 29 generic cross-param return rejected`.

assertions.reason: Previously-landed valid generic `Self` and generic constructor behaviors still pass on the same CLI surface, so the soundness fix did not regress the preserved positive generic flows.
evidence: Fixture registration: `test/test_typecheck.ml` positive tests 22, 23, and 31-35 cover `generic Self substitution`, `generic Self chained`, `generic constructor outside impl`, `generic pair constructor`, `generic constructor option return`, `generic constructor result return`, and `generic constructor typed let`.

Command: `cd /home/lenstr/workspace/personal/hack/rgo-lang && export DUNE_BUILD_DIR=/home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/misc-followups-4/cli-generic-soundness/dune-build && nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe -- test positive 22,23,31-35` -> exit 0 with 7 focused positive tests passing.

Broader confirmation: `nix develop -c dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe --` passed 66 tests and `nix develop -c dune runtest` passed the repository test entrypoint; logs saved at `/home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/misc-followups-4/cli-generic-soundness/full-typecheck.log` and `/home/lenstr/.factory/missions/761991a0-6428-436f-b034-0393187de1c7/evidence/misc-followups-4/cli-generic-soundness/dune-runtest.log`.

frictions: Focused `dune exec ./test/test_typecheck.exe` runs print Alcotest result directories under repo-relative `_build/_tests/typecheck` even when `DUNE_BUILD_DIR` is set, so the stable evidence for this validation is the captured log files under the mission evidence directory.
summary: Validated the generic soundness CLI repair on the real compiler surface: the two new negative generic-soundness regressions pass as rejections, the preserved generic `Self` and constructor positives still pass, the full typecheck executable passes 66 tests, and the repository `dune runtest` entrypoint also succeeds.
